title: Bed Bug Treatment in Irvington, NJ | $1,200 – $3,500
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in Irvington, NJ. Fast, effective extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts serving Irvington. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a bed bug infestation in Irvington, NJ? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout Irvington's residential neighborhoods and apartment complexes. Our certified technicians use advanced heat treatment and chemical solutions to completely eliminate bed bugs from your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Irvington and the greater NYC area for over a decade with proven bed bug elimination methods. We offer same-day service, free inspections, and a 90-day warranty on all bed bug treatments to ensure your home stays pest-free.
localContext: Irvington's mix of historic single-family homes, multi-unit apartment buildings near Springfield Avenue, and properties near Irvington Park often face bed bug challenges due to housing density. Our team is familiar with the unique pest control needs of Irvington's diverse housing stock and provides tailored solutions for every property type.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Irvington, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Irvington typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Irvington take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or require 2-3 visits over several weeks for chemical treatment. The timeline depends on infestation severity and your property size. We'll provide a detailed treatment schedule during your free inspection.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our licensed professionals. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For heat treatments, no chemicals are used at all. We'll provide specific instructions for preparation and re-entry to ensure everyone's safety.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Irvington?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We stand behind our work with a 90-day warranty on all bed bug treatments in Irvington. If bed bugs return within 90 days of treatment, we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. Our goal is complete elimination and your peace of mind.
